TupleHash.__init__c
Authenticate the next tuple of byte strings.
        TupleHash guarantees the logical separation between each byte string.
        Args:
            data (bytes/bytearray/memoryview): One or more items to hash.
        Nz6You cannot call 'update' after 'digest' or 'hexdigest'z#You can only call 'update' on bytes)
	TypeErrorr

TupleHash.updatec
Return the **binary** (non-printable) digest of the tuple of byte strings.
        :return: The hash digest. Binary form.
        :rtype: byte string
        N
read
digestD
TupleHash.digestc
Return the **printable** digest of the tuple of byte strings.
        :return: The hash digest. Hexadecimal encoded.
        :rtype: string

TupleHash.hexdigestc
zNReturn a new instance of a TupleHash object.
        See :func:`new`.
        
digest_bytes
digest_bits)
new)
kwargsr
TupleHash.newN)	
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
__doc__r
Create a new TupleHash128 object.
    Args:
       digest_bytes (integer):
        Optional. The size of the digest, in bytes.
        Default is 64. Minimum is 8.
       digest_bits (integer):
        Optional and alternative to ``digest_bytes``.
        The size of the digest, in bits (and in steps of 8).
        Default is 512. Minimum is 64.
       custom (bytes):
        Optional.
        A customization bytestring (``S`` in SP 800-185).
    :Return: A :class:`TupleHash` object
    r"
z*Only one digest parameter must be provided)
z!'digest_bytes' must be at least 8z0'digest_bytes' must be at least 64 in steps of 8r
Unknown parameters: )
popr
ValueError
strr	
Cryptodome.Util.py3compatr
